reviews.author: Lorenzo Stoakes (Oracle)
reviews.summary: Approved the patch with a Reviewed-by tag, indicating that it looks good to them and they'd like to see it merged.

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch deduplicates the implementation of unlock_list_lru() in the mm/list_lru.c file, consolidating the MEMCG and non-MEMCG variants into a common function.
